professionalExperience.role: Full Stack Developer / AI Team Lead
highlights: Architected an autonomous Database Agent using RAW and SQLAlchemy for natural language querying across SQL and NoSQL systems with granular permission management.
Engineered a provider-agnostic LLM orchestration framework across OpenAI, Gemini, and Groq to reduce API cost and improve system redundancy.
Deployed a scalable computer vision pipeline with Nvidia DeepStream and OpenCV for 24x7 real-time employee activity tracking and operational compliance.
Prototyped an IoT edge computing solution for driver behavior analysis by fusing accelerometer, gyroscope, and GPS streams.
Spearheaded a cross-platform HRMS mobile app using Flutter with shared code across iOS and Android.
Integrated i18n workflows to implement platform-wide multilingual support, improving international client engagement.
Developed a multi-tenant payment infrastructure integrating Stripe and Razorpay for stronger transaction reliability.
Optimized high-volume email outreach workflows using PHP and automation scheduling for global sales campaigns.
